{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Grenn
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Grenn]] is a person who provides information to [[Jai Long]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7">''Soulsmith'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|“Sir. Grenn said that the foreman said that the miners can’t go into the southwest corner of the fourth floor.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
